title: adelocaryum coelestinum
intro: Adelocaryum coelestinum, also known as Lungwort, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to soothe and calm the respiratory system. The health benefits of Lungwort include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its ability to help reduce inflammation and improve breathing. In herbal preparations, Lungwort is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall respiratory health.
